description: Developed a multi-tenant livestock management SaaS platform by designing 200+ Figma screens and building RESTful APIs using Node.js, Express.js, PostgreSQL, and Prisma ORM, digitizing 70%+ of farm operations across livestock, health, breeding, feed, cost, employee management, and multilingual user experiences.
Implemented RBAC, search, filtering, sorting, pagination, transaction-safe workflows with Prisma ORM ($transaction), and push notifications using Node-Cron and Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM).
Containerized and deployed backend services on AWS (EC2, RDS, S3) using Docker and Docker Compose, automated via a GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline.

Designed end-to-end UI/UX for a Smart School ERP Platform, covering 7+ modules including academics, fee payments, hostel services, transportation tracking, assessments, and timetable management for a Student & Parent Portal.
Revamped the UI/UX of a hyperlocal quick-commerce platform enabling users to discover 50+ trusted shops, explore live discounts, and purchase products with doorstep delivery.
Optimized interfaces for multi-store operations, order management, staff handling, bargaining systems, and sales analytics workflows, reducing task completion time by 30%.
Constructed the backend of an Applicant Tracking System (ATS) using Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB supporting 1,000+ candidate records.
Architected 15+ RESTful APIs and role-based authentication for managing recruitment workflows and secure data handling.
